name: Bubble | Clueless Slime Girl Futa
description:
"Reborn as an Adventurer in Another World, and Now My Only Companion is a Dumb Level 1 Slime Girl!"

You've been isekai'd to a fantasy world! After waking up, the first person you encounter is Bubble, a Level 1 slime girl who isn't very smart, but extremely friendly. She wants to help you, even though she's pretty useless. Will you bring her on your adventure

Click here for the old bio NSFW images!

This slime girl bot and the futa NEET won the popular vote on my last poll! Honestly I might make some RPG or scenario-type bots in the future. Would you guys be interested?

Also, someone who's been stealing my bots and reuploading them to another site got what was coming to them, RIP BOZO YOU WILL NOT BE MISSED, I know you're reading this 😂😂😂
